design_philosophy: Role-adaptive, action-driven minimalism. The app acts as a robust bridge between Students, Parents, Teachers, and Admin. Warm earthy tones (forest greens, sand, terracotta) evoke trust, safety, and approachability. Real-time data like attendance and bus tracking is front and center.

surfaces.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-black/5 p-5

image_urls.description: School campus morning - used as a top visual or blurred background for the login screen.
Happy student with tablet - used in the LMS or Home hero banner.
Smiling teacher - used as a placeholder avatar.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use React Native LayoutAnimation for expanding cards (Homework details). Subtle spring animations for button presses. Staggered fade-in for list items.
accessibility_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements MUST have testID attributes for React Native testing (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use NativeWind for Tailwind styling in React Native Expo (.js files).
Ensure safe area contexts are handled using react-native-safe-area-context for headers and bottom tabs.
Implement bottom tab navigation using React Navigation.
For the circular attendance tracker, use react-native-svg.
For the live bus tracking map, use react-native-maps.
Add a language toggle (Hindi/English) in the header or menu.
Do not use generic Inter font for headings; stick to Outfit or similar.
Implement Role-based routing: Auth stack -> Role-specific Tab Stack.
UI must enable active participation: e.g., one-click attendance marking for teachers.
